summary: Iteration 2 backend testing for Harsha 3D portfolio. Extended existing pytest suite with admin-token coverage for GET /api/contact. All 13 tests passed (regression + new). POST /api/contact still public, honeypot still silently dropped, invalid email rejected. GET /api/contact returns 401 without/with-wrong token and 200 with correct token. Profile and projects endpoints unchanged. Mongo _id correctly excluded from contact list responses.
critical_code_review_comments: require_admin returns 503 when ADMIN_TOKEN env var is empty/missing — good fail-fast behavior, but consider documenting this on the OpenAPI schema so deploys without ADMIN_TOKEN don't surprise operators.
GET /api/contact has no pagination cursor; sort+limit only. Fine for current low-volume portfolio use, but flag for future if volume grows.

Honeypot endpoint returns a fully-shaped ContactMessage including a generated id and created_at — this is intentional to mislead bots, but be aware monitoring tools cannot distinguish honeypot 200s from real 200s.
seed_data_creation: Test inserts a few contact messages prefixed TEST_ via POST /api/contact. No cleanup endpoint exists; rows remain in MongoDB contact_messages collection. Not blocking since data is namespaced with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_portfolio_api.py is the single regression file. ADMIN_HEADERS constant at top — reuse for any future admin endpoints. Note FastAPI Header() converts x-admin-token <-> X-Admin-Token transparently; covered by test_get_contact_case_sensitive_header_name. Frontend tests intentionally skipped.
